title: Narsimha Misra
compiled_truth: Narsimha Misra is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-22 to 2002-03-29), Narsimha Misra sent 31 and received 429 emails, totalling 460 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Ring](people/richard-ring) (12), [Joe Stepenovitch](people/joe-stepenovitch) (11), [Gautam Gupta](people/gautam-gupta) (8), [Joe Quenet](people/joe-quenet) (7), [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (7).
